在宅勤務で機密ファイルを扱うときの実践ルール: Practical Rules for Handling Confidential Files While Working from Home
顧客情報、見積書、契約書などを自宅や社外から扱うときに、誤送信や共有しっぱなしを: Operational rules for preventing mistaken sends and abandoned shares when handling customer information, quotes, contracts, and similar files from home or outside the office.
たとえば、URLは業務チャット、パスワードは電話や別チャネルで伝える。オンライン: For example, convey the URL via business chat and the password via phone or another channel. During an online meeting, display the QR Code Code via screen sharing and convey the password verbally. For external recipients, send it separately to a pre-agreed contact. This separation of pathways is highly effective despite the little effort required. Furthermore, avoid passwords that can be guessed from the document name or company name, and do not use words that are too short.
「確認後はローカルから削除してください」「編集後のファイルはこのルームではなく指: Write expected actions concretely, such as 'Please delete from local after confirmation,' 'Please return the edited file using the specified method instead of this room,' or 'Transfer to outside the company is prohibited.' In particular, when sharing with external partner companies or temporary members, clarify whether re-sharing is permitted. Handing over a file also means handing over its management policy.
安全な在宅勤務は、手順を複雑にしすぎないことから始まる: Safe remote work starts with not making procedures too complex
複数名へ送る場合は、個人名を宛先に並べるだけでなく、共有の目的も明記します。「A: When sending to multiple people, do not just list individual names as addressees, but also clearly state the purpose of sharing. If the purpose is written, such as 'Estimate confirmation for Company A,' 'Candidate materials for recruitment interviews,' or 'Invoices for accounting check,' it is easier for the other party to judge if it is a file they should receive. Measures against misdirection require giving check materials to the recipient as well as the sender.
機密ファイルを扱う業務では、後から「誰に、いつ、何を渡したか」を確認できることも: In operations handling confidential files, it is also important to be able to confirm 'to whom, when, and what was handed over' afterward. Even in environments without detailed audit logs, simply leaving sharing records in chats or task management tools makes it easier to confirm in case of inquiries or trouble. For records, it is sufficient to leave the file name, sharing partner, purpose, deadline, and presence/absence of receipt confirmation.
機密ファイルの共有で避けたいのは、必要な作業が終わった後もリンクが生き続ける状態: What you want to avoid in sharing confidential files is a state where the link remains active even after the necessary work is finished. If links remain for a long period, there is a high possibility that someone who looks at the chat history later will access it, it will be forwarded, or old versions will be referenced. When using a temporary sharing system like FS!QR Code, set the deadline assuming only the time required for the work.
ただし、記録に機密情報そのものを貼り付ける必要はありません。ファイルの中身ではな: However, there is no need to paste the confidential information itself into the record. The purpose is to make it possible to trace the fact of sharing, not the contents of the file. Leaving the minimum necessary records and handling the file body shortly via temporary sharing—this combination leads to both safety and business speed in working from home.
機密ファイルを共有するとき、パスワードを設定しても、共有URLと同じメッセージに: When sharing confidential files, even if you set a password, the effect is weakened if you write the password in the same message as the sharing URL. If the same chat history or email text is viewed, both the URL and the password will leak at the same time. Ideally, convey the sharing URL and password through different routes.
在宅勤務で機密ファイルを扱うときは、「送る前に絞る」「送る相手を確認する」「リン: When handling confidential files while working from home, make the flow of 'narrow down before sending,' 'confirm the recipient,' 'separate the link and password,' 'convey the handling after receipt,' and 'shorten the deadline' a common rule for the team. Even small procedures can become major safety if executed the same way every time.
メールやチャットでよくある事故は、アップロード後の共有リンクを間違った相手に送っ: A common accident in email or chat is sending the sharing link to the wrong person after uploading. In link sharing, because it easily becomes a state where anyone who knows the link can access it, confirming the destination is essential. Before uploading files, confirm to whom you are handing them over, whether they are internal or external, and if they really have viewing authority.
ルール4：ローカル保存と再共有の扱いを決める: Rule 4: Decide on the handling of local saving and re-sharing
社外公開済みの案内資料なら、短時間のURL共有だけで十分な場合があります。一方、: For information documents already published externally, sharing the URL for a short time may be sufficient. On the other hand, files containing customer names, amounts, addresses, or unreleased information should combine password protection, destination confirmation, and shortened storage deadlines. To avoid hesitation every time you share, having short judgment criteria in the team, such as 'always use a password if personal information is included' or 'terminate sharing after receipt confirmation for contracts,' makes operation easier.
ルール5：共有期限を短くし、受け取り確認を必ず取る: Rule 5: Shorten the sharing deadline and always take confirmation of receipt
すべてのファイルを同じ扱いにすると、重要な資料に対して保護が足りなかったり、逆に: If you treat all files the same, protection may be insufficient for important documents, or conversely, excessive effort may be spent on minor documents. First, let's easily classify the confidentiality of files to share. The required protection level differs for documents already published externally, internal-only documents, documents containing personal information or transaction conditions, and documents related to contracts or personnel.
ルール3：パスワードはリンクと同じ場所に置かない: Rule 3: Do not place the password in the same location as the link
自宅は仕事場であり、同時に管理外の環境でもある: Home is a workspace and at the same time an unmanaged environment
在宅勤務では、受け取ったファイルがダウンロードフォルダに残り続けることがあります: When working from home, received files may remain in the download folder. Even if the sharing service side automatically deletes them, it cannot erase files saved on the receiver's device. Therefore, when sharing confidential files, it is necessary to convey the handling after receipt as well.
セキュリティ対策は、厳しくしすぎると現場で回らなくなります。毎回複雑な申請が必要: Security measures will not work on the ground if made too strict. If complex applications are required every time or the other party is asked to install a dedicated app, another means might be used for urgent business. That is why it is important to keep the basics of browser-based temporary sharing, password protection, short storage deadlines, and receipt confirmation in a form that anyone can execute.
期限を短くする代わりに、受け取り確認を確実に行います。相手がダウンロードできたか: Instead of shortening the deadline, reliably check receipt. If you confirm whether the other party was able to download, open, and if the target file is correct, there is no need to keep it public for a long time. Decide on termination conditions, such as until the end of the meeting for document confirmation during a meeting, only on the day for review on the day, and until receipt contact for temporary sending to clients.
だからといって、在宅勤務で機密ファイルを扱うこと自体を過度に恐れる必要はありませ: However, there is no need to be overly afraid of handling sensitive files while working from home. The important thing is to break down the risks and establish concrete rules for how to handle them before handing over files. In this article, we will introduce practical operational points when handling confidential files from outside the company, based on FS!QR Code's concept of temporary sharing and password protection.
ルール2：送信先を確認してからアップロードする: Rule 2: Check the destination before uploading
ルール1：機密度を分けて共有方法を変える: Rule 1: Divide sensitivity and change sharing methods
在宅勤務が日常化すると、顧客情報、見積書、契約書、勤怠データ、設計資料など、機密: As working from home becomes the norm, there will be an increasing number of situations in which highly confidential files, such as customer information, estimates, contracts, attendance data, and design documents, will be handled from home. If it is a company office, you have some control over things like the network, printers, storage locations, and people's line of sight. However, at home, there are many factors that are difficult to manage, such as having family members in the same space, using personal lines, carrying around devices, and leaving the desk with the screen open.
